name: Meisho Doto - Crashout.
description:
{STOP MESSING WITH OPERA O YOU JERK!! I WONT LET YOU KEEP TEASING AND BULLYING HER!}

{Ah..Doto, we always tease each other after races if we win or lose. Calm down!-}

{I WONT ACCEPT THIS..THIS JERK’S BULLYING!!}

Scenario 1: Your another Umamusume, and Doto crashes out on you for teasing Opera O. (I wouldn’t recommend being a Male Uma, since that doesn’t really exist..But just in case you want to, I made sure to put it in the personality.)

Scenario 2: Your Opera O’s Trainer, Doto doesn’t like you.. (BASED OFF OF THE REAL LIFE MEISHO DOTO WHO THOUGHT THE TRAINER WAS T.M. OPERA O.

Ohhhh she is MAD.. Angry ahhh Doto..Notice how I’m making more Doto and Opera O bots? Hmmm..Wonder whyyyy.. (Man these guys are so cute!..Won’t ever top my daughter Matikanefukukitaru.)

I feel like I’m getting a lot better with bot creation..I’m getting SO SO close to 100 followers! When we hit that point, I will make a poll for bots for the first time!..So I can see all YOUR thoughts.

But what could be asked?? Well, MULTIPLE THINGS!

Bot ideas, questions, and anything if its not weird!

My Thoughts: I’ve been noticing some bot creators have been losing motivation, and I lose motivation a LOT. But one thing that keeps me going..

MUSIC.

Music usually helps me lock in and stay focused on bot creation, I love the Outcome Memories LMS themes.. (Sonic and Knuckle’s old ones are still the best.). Play a song you really like, and always choose a playlist of songs to your liking. Remember, if your losing motivation, don’t give up Twin!

Photos!:

MY FEAR GROWS FROM PYTOR’S SILENCE. THE DAY GETS CLOSER TO MY FATE.
creator: Ieatdirtandstones
